feedback.text: We would like to thank the European Commission for giving us the opportunity to provide our feedback on the Digital Fairness Act. Please find attached a set of proposals resulting from an interdisciplinary research cycle involving more than 40 contributors (academics, professional and consumer associations, regulatory authorities) that took place in Paris in September 2023 and March 2025, concerning the various European legal instruments of digital practices that influence and manipulate consumers: proposals relating in particular to an Omnibus Directive on Digital Fairness. Juliette Sénéchal, Professor of Law at the University of Lille and Sabine Bernheim-Desvaux, Professor of Law at the University of Angers
